name: Intimidator Wash Zoom 450 IRC
comment: Intimidator Wash Zoom 450 IRC is a powerful moving head wash fitted with twelve 20 W quad-color RGBW LEDs and a motorized zoom for short-throw or long throw applications. Other convenient features include a Totem mode that keeps beams aimed at the dance floor and eye-catching auto programs with zone control. Wireless (non-DMX control is possible using the optional IRC-6 remote. Up to four fixtures can be linked to create synchronized shows in automated, sound and master/slave modes.

capabilities.effectName: Color Jump F > S - Rotate Random

capabilities.comment: Fast On  Slow Off (F > S) - Strobe Pulse Open
Slow On  Fast Off (F > S) - Strobe Pulse Closed
Random Fast On  Slow Off (F > S) - Strobe Pulse Random
Random Slow On  Fast Off (F > S) - Strobe Pulse Random
Pulse Effect 1 (F > S) - Strobe Pulse Random
Pulse Effect 2 (F > S) - Strobe Pulse Random
Gradually On And Off (F > S) - Strobe Pulse Random
Pulse Effect 3 (F > S) - Strobe Pulse Random
